_comment: Custom place names. Detected in speech and added to things.json under 'places'. Case-insensitive matching.
_examples: Add your local hospitals, care homes, streets, councils, schools, clinics, offices.
These are matched as whole words — no regex needed, just the name.
_note: These are ADDED to the built-in UK location list. You do not need to repeat defaults like 'Barnet', 'London', 'hospital', etc.
